name: Mill Mousing
description: Clear the mill of mice. Slide flour sacks to reach the rat nest.

name: Granary Patrol
description: Patrol the granary perimeter. Slide crates and barrels.

name: Cathedral Mousing
description: Hunt mice in the cathedral. Slide pews and candlestands.

name: Warehouse Clearing
description: Clear out a large warehouse. Slide crates in a tight grid.

name: Ship Hold
description: Purge rats from a merchant vessel. Slide cargo and coiled rope.

name: Market Letter
description: Deliver a letter through the busy market. Slide stalls and carts.

name: Monastery Dispatch
description: Carry a message to the monastery. Slide garden hedges and walls.

name: Noble's Sealed Letter
description: Deliver a sealed letter past manor guards. Slide furniture and dodge guard dogs.

name: Tavern Cellar
description: Clear rats from the tavern cellar. Watch for spilled ale.

name: Dockside Patrol
description: Patrol the docks at night. Ship rats are bold and numerous.

name: Bakery Guard
description: Protect the baker's flour stores from vermin overnight.

name: Bell Tower Dispatch
description: Carry a message to the bell ringer. Climb past pigeons and narrow ledges.

name: Herbalist Delivery
description: Bring herbs from the garden to the apothecary across town.

name: Castle Ratcatcher
description: The castle lord's pantry is infested. Expectations are high.

name: Night Courier
description: Deliver a sealed message through dark alleys after curfew.

name: Estate Nightwatch
description: Patrol a nobleman's estate through the night. Report anything unusual.

name: Caravan Escort
description: Escort a merchant caravan between towns. Bandits and wolves are a risk.

name: Treasury Guard
description: Guard the lord's treasury overnight. Thieves are clever and persistent.

name: Cathedral Vigil
description: Keep watch over the cathedral relics through the night. A sacred duty.

name: Relic Guardian
description: Guard a holy relic during its procession through the town.

name: Omen Reading
description: The abbot seeks guidance. Interpret the signs in the chapel smoke.

name: Lost Object Recovery
description: A merchant lost a valuable ring. Search the market square.

name: Infestation Scout
description: Map the rat tunnels beneath the granary district. Don't get caught.

name: Mystery Investigation
description: The bishop's cat has gone missing. Follow the clues through the old quarter.

name: Gate Watch
description: Watch the town gate from dusk to dawn. Report suspicious visitors.

name: Dock Patrol
description: Patrol the harbor docks. Smugglers are getting bolder.

name: Chapel Blessing
description: Sit beside the altar during evening prayers. Your presence comforts the faithful.

name: Pilgrimage Escort
description: Accompany pilgrims on the road to the monastery. Keep spirits high.

name: Market Watch
description: Keep an eye on the market square. Something has been going missing from the stalls.

name: Tunnel Mapping
description: Map the network of passages beneath the old quarter. Don't get lost.

name: Merchant's Lockbox
description: A merchant left his lockbox unguarded. The contents could feed the guild for days. But is it right?

name: Rival's Supplies
description: A rival organization stores supplies in the old quarter. Sabotage them — the guild needs the advantage.

name: Saint's Vigil
description: Keep vigil through the night at St. Gertrude's shrine. The faithful need a guardian. Pay is modest, but the saint remembers.
